songs.title: Look Ma No Brains!
feed: “Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day spends a 4th week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 30 sales units.
“Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 50 streams units.
“Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 2 airplay units.
“Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 284,382 total units.
